name: Lemon Apricot Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind.
2. Mix in the apricot pulp until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Cover with whipped cream or meringue.
5. Chill before serving.
6. If using meringue, beat two egg whites until stiff. Add two tablespoons of granulated sugar and spread over the pie.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) until the meringue is brown.
Note: To prepare the apricot pulp, drain off any liquid from canned or freshly stewed apricots and force through a coarse strainer using a food processor. Prunes can be used as a substitute for apricots.
